name: @aily-project/lib-m5stack-unified
author: M5Stack / ailyProject
description: 基于 M5Stack 官方 M5Unified 与 M5GFX 的板载外设积木库，自动识别开发板并提供显示、触摸、按键、IMU、RTC、音频、电源、休眠、振动和 LED 功能。
description_zh_cn: 基于 M5Stack 官方 M5Unified 与 M5GFX 的板载外设积木库，自动识别开发板并提供显示、触摸、按键、IMU、RTC、音频、电源、休眠、振动和 LED 功能。
description_en: Blockly bindings for the official M5Unified and M5GFX libraries. The selected M5Stack board is detected automatically, with no onboard pin configuration required.
